# DevOps AI by RainTech

> AI-powered operational platform for Managed Service Providers (MSPs), deployed from the Azure Marketplace.

## Core Pages
- [Home](https://devops.ai.rain.tech/)
- [Platform Overview](https://devops.ai.rain.tech/platform.html)
- [Architecture](https://devops.ai.rain.tech/architecture.html)

- [Security](https://devops.ai.rain.tech/security.html)
- [Marketplace](https://devops.ai.rain.tech/marketplace.html)
- [About](https://devops.ai.rain.tech/about.html)

- [Privacy Policy](https://devops.ai.rain.tech/legal/privacy.html)
